Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're doing a multi-stage 212 CC go-kart engine build to show how to have fun on a budget.
Video.title: Single Cylinder Special

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Video.summary: Our 460 Big Block Ford is back! We upgrade it with a weight saving, better flowing induction.
Video.title: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We dyno test a custom-built 5.3 LS crate engine and talk in-depth about the importance of quality fasteners.
Video.title: Crate Horsepower

Video.summary: We put our past engine builds to the test now that they have been installed in awesome hot rods!
Video.title: Chassis Dyno Mania

Video.summary: Engine Power gets the honor of rebuilding the 640 inch blown nitrous injected V8.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 1

Video.summary: The team visits Kaase Racing to machine the 429 inch Ford big block from the first monster truck, Big Foot #1.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 2

Video.summary: Mike and Pat assemble and dyno tune massive 640 cubic inch tri-power 429 Ford with 871 blower and nitrous.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 3

Video.summary: After 23 years in retirement, original BigFoot monster truck comes alive.
Video.title: BigFoot Lives

Video.summary: Project Cream Puff gets air-ride and a supercharger for a slammed, powerful C-10 street machine.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Video.summary: Our guys are towing the line because it’s all about second chances for a 1977 Chevy C-30 tow truck!
Video.title: Tow Truck

Video.summary: The Music City Trucks team is kicking off a 2020 Ford F-150 sport truck project.
Video.title: Ford F-150 Dream Build

Video.summary: Dyno Day! We assemble our 363 SBF beast and reveal the project it was built for.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Today we’ll show you the 5 most common reasons your engine won’t start...and how to fix it!
Video.title: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Image.alt: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Video.summary: Turning A 1941 Dodge Army Truck into Sergeant Rock
Video.title: Sergeant Rock

Video.summary: Sergeant Rock Gets Metal Work Done
Video.title: Metal Working

Video.summary: Bed Construction For Sergeant Rock
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Bed Construction

Video.summary: We give you an update on transforming the 1941 Dodge Power Wagon into the legendary Sergeant Rock.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock

Video.summary: We transform a neglected 1941 Dodge army truck, Sergeant Rock, with a custom paint job.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Part 2

Video.summary: We explore the process of creating a custom suspension for a military-style truck using salvaged parts.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Part 3

Video.summary: We explore engine choices for the Sergeant Rock project, opting for a beefy 850 horsepower Mopar engine.
Video.title: Engine Choices For Sgt. Rock

Video.summary: The Sergeant Rock Army Truck comes to life with a mix of vintage and modern elements.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Pay-Off

Video.summary: The 88 K1500 4WD gets slammed with a 4”-6” lowering kit.
Video.title: Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4

Image.alt: Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4
Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4
Installing 4/6 Lowering Kit on a Chevy K1500 4x4

Video.summary: LT hoists the tired 350 from the engine compartment for a budget conscious 5.3L LS.
Video.title: LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500

Image.alt: LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500
LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500
LS Swap Do's & Don'ts on a Chevy K1500

Video.summary: There’s a new purpose and a new plan for our Chevy K1500.
Video.title: AWD vs. 4WD Chevy 1500

Video.summary: Our '88 K1500 AWD Chevy needs more fuel for the 5.3, so it’s time to feed the beast!
Video.title: Upgrading a K1500 5.3 Fuel System

Video.summary: LT shows how to build a custom exhaust, and Austin brings new life to a dull paint finish.
Video.title: Building a Custom K1500 Exhaust

Video.summary: It's the start of our all new MuscleTrux series and to kick it off, Ford versus Chevy.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 1

Video.summary: Bowtie boy Ryan's got a big play for using big displacement to make big power for his entry.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 2: 1990 Chevrolet 454 SS

Video.summary: It's Blue Oval boy Kevin's turn to take over the shop.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 3: 1994 Ford Lightning

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: Ryan returns fire as his 1990 Chevy 454 SS also gets dropped down into the weeds.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 5

Video.summary: It's a chassis dyno shootout to see what kind of power our sport trucks are making.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 6

Video.summary: It's finally time to lay it on the line as we put the two trucks in head to head competition.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 7

Video.summary: Building a big block bow tie classic on a shoestring budget.
Video.title: 454 Budget Build

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, we’ll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: We upgrade our 5.3 LS with forged parts, cam, EFI then dyno NA & boosted on 93 octane.
Video.title: Salvage to Savage 5.3 LS

Video.summary: The Engine Power team takes a '73 Split-Bumper Chevy Camaro and turns it into a triple threat car.
Video.title: Triple Threat Camaro

Video.summary: Chevy vs. Ford in a horsepower battle of the big blocks.
Video.title: 454 Power Build

Video.summary: Making a modern day muscle car with 454-powered 1985 Monte Carlo.
Video.title: 454 meet '85 Monte Carlo
